title: Semantic Event Extraction Datasets
author: Kuculo, Tin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Two datasets for Semantic Event Extraction that have been created using a distant labelling approach. 
 They contain sentences from Wikipedia and events identified within them, their relations and attributes regarding the classes, properties and entities in the Wikidata and DBpedia knowledge graphs.
steps_raw:
